payload.expected: The claimed baseline and candidate helper tests could run from the isolated run artifacts.
payload.observed: Both first test commands stopped with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for sibling playtest-prd-prep and playtest validator paths absent from the isolated run layout.
payload.consequence: The deterministic comparison required an extra failed test pass and manual dependency snapshot setup before both variants could be rerun 17/17.
payload.workaround_taken: Copied frozen playtest-prd-prep and playtest sibling skill trees into the run artifact layout, then reran both variants identically.

payload.expected: Hash-verified isolated baseline and candidate trials could run applicable deterministic target checks against the repository-owned checklist authority.
payload.observed: The isolated to-prd validator resolved its repository-relative checklist authority under reports/skill-evidence/to-prd/docs/agents/issue-tracker.md, which did not exist; several raw baseline validations stopped before body inspection.
payload.consequence: Deterministic evidence required extra adjudication and reruns even though the decontamination completed correctly and landed a validated candidate.
payload.workaround_taken: Preserved the raw failures, proved baseline and candidate helper bytes identical, ran the live-path helper suite, and used the byte-identical live validator or an authority-path rewrite for comparable body checks.

payload.expected: After accepted validation, the guarded land result would unambiguously establish whether completion could proceed.
payload.observed: The helper landed the candidate and returned mirror_status broken because .agents/skills/to-issues was a directory, while the workflow did not state whether that diagnostic blocked completion.
payload.consequence: The run paused for read-only inspection of the helper and mirror before recording the successful terminal outcome; no target rollback or unsafe state occurred.
payload.workaround_taken: Inspected the land-result handling and mirror state, confirmed the diagnostic was non-gating, left the mirror unchanged, and recorded it in the completion note and report.
